narrative:
Precinct Toledo 14B (precinct in Lucas County) has 989 registered voters, with 78.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points.
